reviews.review_description: This is one of the most unique and immersive experiences I've had in VR. Every action feels incredibly realistic — from handling the hive to managing your bees, everything is well documented and intuitive. The attention to detail is remarkable, and you genuinely feel like a real beekeeper. It's the kind of game that teaches you something while keeping you completely engaged. Absolutely worth trying for the unique experience alone — there's nothing else like it on Quest!
a good simulation of keeping bees

Every time I open the game, the whole world is spinning, and I can't get it to stop:(  if any one has some tips to make it stop, I would really appreciate it, I am really looking forward to play the game once I can. :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for letting us know about your experience, and we’re sorry to hear you’re running into this issue. After reviewing this behavior across multiple devices, we can confirm that the game itself is not exhibiting world-spinning or rotation problems on our end. This type of issue is most commonly related to headset or controller sensor calibration on the Oculus Quest rather than the game.
We recommend restarting the headset, re-centering your view, and checking the controller/joystick calibration in the Oculus settings. These steps typically resolve the spinning effect immediately.
We really appreciate your interest in the game, and we hope this helps get everything working smoothly so you can enjoy the full experience. If the issue continues, feel free to reach out with any additional details so we can try to assist further.

reviews.review_description: I was really excited about this game but I am unable to get it to work. I can’t get low enough to pick up the items and if I am accidentally able to pick an item up and drop it, spawns through the floor. If anyone knows of a way to fix that I would love to know. Would love to be able to try this game. Otherwise I guess I’ll request a refund.
Was super excited for the game but nothing seems to work the honey extractor falls off everything the frames don’t go in right the strainer doesn’t give wax and the pot won’t pour candles
I love how the cardboard boxes can hold all the honey jars so you can sell them, why cant i do the same with the candles? Other than that, love the game!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! We're glad you're enjoying the box system. Candle stacking/boxing is something we’ve already planned, and it will be added in a future update. Thanks for the great suggestion!

reviews.review_description:
So far I love the game. My biggest problem is I do not know how to save the game and every time I play it I have to start all over which is making me really pissed off about the game.


The game has an in game save. Now that I know how to save my game. I love the game even more. And now it's a 5 star game. Thank you for the game developers.

developer_response.body: I think this are extra settings on your device that prevent change/save game on device.

reviews.review_description: I would definitely recommend this game to anyone who does bee keeping or wants to or even if you just want a new game to play it’s pretty realistic for the most part only thing I’d say about it is the black paint isn’t working it spawns yellow paint when I buy black and the game has a few glitches here and there like my extractor has glitched into the ground and I had to buy a new one but overall I think this game is great I just got it yesterday and I have 3 hours on it definitely worth the money honestly it could go for 25$ and it’ll still be worth the money

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! 
In the next updates I'll check and solve this issues.

reviews.review_title: Overpriced for where it is now
reviews.review_description: Quest 1 graphics. I made it through the tutorial and then gave up a third of the way into assembling my hive box. No "force" grab and things spawn on the ground, great if you want to get your squats in. When it takes longer than 30 seconds to pick something up you know you're in for a bad time. Maybe worth struggling through it at half this price.

developer_response.body: There is no ""force" grab" in real life. Things can't spawn in middle air, this is not how things should work. If you can't pick objects from the ground just reset your ground level. If this game is too expensive don't buy it and ask for refund. By the way, this game work also on Quest1 as well and you saw the graphics in the trailer.

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy this game. 
The graphics are so real, better than other games.
The gameplay is so relaxing and also the background sounds are so peaceful.
Everything works ok. I had no save problems, saves are working normal. 
I wish there were more customizable things like flowers and pots and fences.
Per total is a really grate game! Keep the good work developers!

Playing Beekeeping Simulator is a great way to relax and unwind. The graphics are beautiful and the gameplay is smooth.
It is also entertaining and informative. It's a great way to learn about the world of beekeeping while having fun.

No other simulator game can beat this one on oculus quest! 
And the game mechanics are insane, after playing this you can rise bees for real! It is insane! 👍🏻 5/5 ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

This is a really grate idea. A game about beekeeping is like a hobby and it is so relaxing. Also the sounds make all so pretty.
Recomand this game if you want to play a chill and beautiful game.

Adding the boards with facts about bees and beekeeping is a grate idea. I spent like half of hour reading it 😄 Learned so much crazy stuff about bees.
Also the game teach you how to care about bees.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but save doesn’t work 😡
reviews.review_description:
Update 3/30/24:  The game seems to be saving now so that is great!  I will try coffee shop sim today and will report on that games review.  
I put out a video on my YouTube channel if you want to check it out @A-P-E Boys.
I think this game has a lot of potential so I hope the devs keep at it.  I have some ideas for the game but I see you don't have a Discord.  You should think about setting one up for all your games.  It's a great way to work with the community on your game to make it as successful as possible.  I am involved with a lot of early access games Discords,  and I report bugs, give suggestions and work with the devs to build the best game possible.  It's like having free Beta testers for your game and the community loves to be involved.  Just a thought it is your game so do as you choose.  Anyway keep it up and I look forward to future updates🤔

I bought coffee shop sim and enjoyed it for almost 2 hrs straight.  Save the game at the computer and exited the game.  When I logged back in I realized the game never saved.  
I bought bee keeper simulator and the exact same thing.  Luckily I only played for 30 minutes.
Not sure what the problem is Developers but that is two of your games with same issue.  
I read other reviews and I am not the only one.  
Please stop everything you are doing and prioritize this or you will permanently lose credibility as a developer period.  As soon as you fix both games save feature I will come back and change my review.  Thanks 🙏

developer_response.body: I don't know about saving on computer, the game work on quest, it does not need a computer, maybe this is the save problem.

reviews.review_description: Good 👍🏻

This game have a huge potential and it started okay. I think this game could be the best simulation game not only on vr but on other devices also. 
Keep the good work devs! 👍🏻

developer_response.body: Thank you! The game will continue to be developed.

reviews.review_description: My father used to have bees and i recognize all the stuff. Playing the game bring me memories. Grate game.
It need some work but it have potential to be the best simulator game on quest.

developer_response.body: Thank you! The game just launched so more updates will come.

reviews.review_description: I love the relaxing gameplay! 🙏
Ingenious game with a grate idea and gameplay
